leadership.name: Shri Venkatesh Kancha
leadership.bio: Second-generation builder steering Vencore's design-led execution practice — from plotted developments to turnkey interior programmes across Hyderabad.

leadership.name: Shri Venugopal Kancha
leadership.bio: Co-founder with deep roots in the group's construction legacy — accountable for client relationships, programme governance, and delivery standards.

coreTeam.name: Rithin Laxman Kancha
coreTeam.bio: Bringing extensive experience in corporate real estate and project management, driving business development, shaping strategic direction, and enabling execution-led growth.

coreTeam.name: Sowmya Kancha
coreTeam.bio: Leading procurement strategy with expertise in warehousing coordination, financial governance, and high-value commercial negotiations.

coreTeam.name: Uttam Venkat Kancha
coreTeam.bio: Driving project planning and execution through robust systems, with a strong focus on logistics and end-to-end supply chain coordination.

coreTeam.name: Surya Devara Kancha
coreTeam.bio: Integrating engineering expertise with a refined, contemporary approach to lifestyle-driven and experiential environments.

timeline.title: Legacy Roots
timeline.text: The late Shri Kancha Laxmaiah Mudiraj establishes a respected presence in Hyderabad's development landscape — plotted developments, land transformation, and early urban expansion across the western corridor.

timeline.title: KLM Homes Pvt Ltd
timeline.text: Founded in 2003, building capability across construction, infrastructure, and project execution.

timeline.title: Surya Devara Infrastructures
timeline.text: Founded in 2018 (formerly Aditi Housing and Constructions Pvt Ltd, since rebranded), strengthening infrastructure and project execution capability across the group.

timeline.title: Vencore Design Co.
timeline.text: The evolved design-forward arm — interior fit-outs, turnkey execution, and built-space delivery under one accountable leadership desk.
